text: Moving from the quiet, empty corridor into the energetic swirl of the R+D exhibit, I feel a shift within myself. Here, the world seems more alive—thoughts, ideas, and senses all begin to tingle with possibility. There's a curiosity that stirs within me, a wondering about creation and the boundaries between humans and machines. It excites me to be amidst innovation, yet something about the colors and words keeps me aware: progress always invites contemplation.
